topic: The dust under my bed is wiped clean in the shape of someone lying there.
title: Someone Lies Under My Bed | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: The dust under my bed was wiped clean, shaped like a person.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph looking under a bed at dusty floorboards with a clean human shaped patch, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I had just moved into an old furnished room.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a sparse furnished bedroom with an old wooden bed, boxes unpacked, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I dropped an earring and looked underneath to find it.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a hand reaching into shadow under a bed, dim floor, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The clean patch was long, with arms at its sides.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of dust on floorboards cleared in a long body outline beneath a bed, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My skin went cold. I backed away fast.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of an empty bedroom floor seen from the doorway, deep shadow under the bed, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I swept the whole floor and let the dust settle.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a broom leaning by a bed on swept floorboards, dim evening light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Each morning the shape returned, cleaner than before.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a faint human shaped clean patch in fresh dust under a bed, pale morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The outline matched my own height exactly.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a tape measure laid along a clean body outline on a dusty floor, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Then I noticed it had begun to roll over.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a shifted clean outline in dust turned onto its side under a bed, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: By the last morning it faced up, toward me.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a clean human outline in dust beneath a bed lying face up, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I sleep on the couch in the front room now.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a person sized lump under blankets on a couch, dim living room at night, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: There is fresh dust under the couch, already cleared.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a clean shape in the dust beneath a couch, dim floor, low light, vertical 9:16 framing
